title: The Reach Circuit
description: Walk the failing wardstone circuit, find out what happened to Senior Cape Vael, and re-seal the keystone before the silence swallows the Reach.

steps.text: Speak with Bram Holdfast and the villager, and leave with a concrete lead.
Leave the waystation and set out for the north wood.
Examine the cracked wardstone, deal with what it drew from the moor, then follow the trail east.
Cross Blackgorge Bridge — pay, parley, or fight — and reach the ward-complex beyond.
Read the old dedication stone in the sanctum.
Examine what's left of Senior Cape Vael's seal.
Search the ruins, learn Vael's fate, and find the way down.
Reach the keystone and renew its failing binding — trace the rite and set your own seal.
